assembly_name.title: Reference Genome Name
assembly_name.description: Display name for the reference genome shown in the browser (e.g. GRCh38, hg38, mm10) (optional)

fasta.title: Reference FASTA (optional)
fasta.description: Reference genome FASTA file. If not provided, it will be detected from the input pipeline's execution logs.

vcf.title: VCF Files
vcf.description: Variant calls in gzipped VCF format

bigwig.title: BigWig Files
bigwig.description: Coverage or signal tracks in BigWig format

gtf.title: GTF Files
gtf.description: Gene annotations in bgzipped, tabix-indexed GTF format
